data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. INFLAMED will be chasing a hat-trick of wins, having sat handy and drawing clear to win the G3 South Island Breeders’ Stakes over 1600m here 3 weeks ago. She has earned her top weight, but is still the one to beat again. 2. SIR ALBERT was unsuited and needed his last start at Ashburton over 1300m 9 days ago when well beaten. The extra 300m is the key, and with less time between runs, a form reversal is on the cards. 3. WITZ END was a brave fifth in the G3 White Robe Lodge two back and then delivered as the favourite over 1400m here 3 weeks ago, and while this field is stronger, he has been racing well enough to go close to repeating the dose. 7. STONYBRECK stuck on gamely for third over 1800m here last start, beaten only a neck, and he is peaking at the right time. Opie Bosson keeps the ride, and with 1.5kg less to carry, he can figure in the top 3 again. 16. OUR APPROVAL has been steadily progressing through the grades. He drops sharply in weight, and is worth including.","runners":[1,2,3,7,16],"exclusive":true}
